title: Programme Associate
description:
Role Description

The Programme Associate is essential in executing enriching and impactful programmes for the children (primary school levels) at our outreach centres. The incumbent will conduct a set of children’s programmes covering subjects such as life skills, art, sports, and STEM (Science, Technology, Engineering & Mathematics). He/She must be flexible, passionate, and dedicated to fostering children's growth.

Key Responsibilities

1. Programme Delivery:

  • Lead and facilitate structured activities for children
  • Adapt activities to cater to different learning needs and energy levels of the children
  • Prepare materials required for the session

2. Children Engagement:

  • Create a welcoming and inclusive environment that encourages participation
  • Ensure children’s well-being and safety during activities

3. Programme Evaluation:

  • Provide feedback on sessions and suggest improvements to enhance the engagement
  • Carry out programme evaluation to assess learning and satisfaction
  • Communicate any observations or recommendations to support continuous programme development.

Requirements

  • GCE ‘A’ Level and above preferably, or Minimally GCE ‘O’ Level with relevant experience
  • Fresh graduates are welcome to apply
  • Passion for working with children and creating a positive impact
  • Ability to lead and manage a group of children effectively
  • Ability to respond quickly and adapt lesson delivery accordingly
  • Effective communication and interpersonal skills
  • Experience in facilitation, teaching or working with children
  • Able to commit up to 3 months or more

Working Hours

Weekdays afternoon (adhoc) at our Outreach Centres from

  • 2:30pm to 5:30pm or;
  • 3:00pm to 6:00pm

How to Apply:
Please email your detailed CV to recruitment@chijsc.org.sg

postedCompany.description:
CHIJ Sanctuary for Children (CHIJSC) is a registered charity organisation with IPC (Institution of a Public Character) status. We are endorsed by the Catholic Archdiocese of Singapore, a member organisation of Caritas Singapore (CSCC) and National Council of Social Services (NCSS).

CHIJSC serves children and youth from diverse racial groups and religions. A caring environment and support, conducive to balanced growth and personal formation is paramount in helping the children and youth grow in motivation, maturity and confidence, to become positive, independent and responsible adults in the future. In addition, we continue to serve the few elderly ladies that have been with us for many years. For all under our care, we seek your much appreciated support.



The mission and objectives of CHIJSC are to:
a) Provide a caring and supportive environment conducive to the balanced growth and personal formation of children, young persons, and youth at risk, to help them grow into responsible individuals, well-equipped for life, with a capacity to contribute to society

b) Ensure that the Catholic character and charism distinctive of the Infant Jesus Sisters are preserved and developed, while children, young persons, and youth under our care are provided with a holistic education, to assist them in developing their full potential.
postedCompany.name: CHIJ SANCTUARY FOR CHILDREN LIMITED
